metadata.description: Universal Knowledge Graph showing cross-domain connections for polymath thinking

nodes.label: Decomposition
nodes.description: Breaking complex problems into smaller, manageable parts

nodes.label: Modularity
nodes.description: Designing systems as independent, interchangeable modules

nodes.label: API
nodes.description: Interface for communication between systems

nodes.label: Abstraction
nodes.description: Hiding complex details behind simple interfaces

nodes.label: Audience Analysis
nodes.description: Understanding who you're speaking to and adapting accordingly

nodes.label: Tone Modulation
nodes.description: Adjusting tone based on audience size and context

nodes.label: Slang & Colloquialism
nodes.description: Using appropriate informal language for connection

nodes.label: Conflict Resolution
nodes.description: Navigating disagreements to positive outcomes

nodes.label: Transaction Cost
nodes.description: Cost incurred in making an economic exchange

nodes.label: Middleman Economics
nodes.description: Value extraction by intermediaries in transactions

nodes.label: Game Theory
nodes.description: Mathematical models of strategic interaction

nodes.label: Trust Networks
nodes.description: Systems of reliability and reputation in commerce

nodes.label: Chord Progression
nodes.description: Sequence of musical chords creating harmonic movement

nodes.label: Repetition Mastery
nodes.description: Learning through deliberate, spaced repetition

nodes.label: Emotional Resonance
nodes.description: How sound frequencies trigger emotional responses

nodes.label: Pattern Recognition
nodes.description: Identifying recurring musical structures

nodes.label: Progressive Overload
nodes.description: Gradually increasing stress on the body for adaptation

nodes.label: Spatial Awareness
nodes.description: Understanding body position in space

nodes.label: Risk Assessment
nodes.description: Evaluating danger before physical action

nodes.label: Kinesthetic Learning
nodes.description: Learning through physical movement and doing

nodes.label: Cognitive Load
nodes.description: Amount of mental effort used in working memory

nodes.label: Transfer Learning
nodes.description: Applying knowledge from one domain to another

nodes.label: Flow State
nodes.description: Mental state of complete absorption in activity

nodes.label: Habit Formation
nodes.description: Process of creating automatic behavioral patterns

nodes.label: Inversion Thinking
nodes.description: Solve problems backward - think of what you want to avoid

nodes.label: Circle of Competence
nodes.description: Know what you know and don't know; stay in your lane

nodes.label: Second-Order Thinking
nodes.description: Consider the consequences of consequences

nodes.label: Occam's Razor
nodes.description: The simplest explanation is usually correct

nodes.label: Feedback Loops
nodes.description: Circular processes where output becomes input

nodes.label: Bayesian Thinking
nodes.description: Update beliefs as new evidence emerges

edges.description: Decomposition (CS) → Audience Analysis: Break down audience into segments
Decomposition → Transaction Cost: Breaking down fee structures
Decomposition → Risk Assessment: Breaking complex risks into parts
Decomposition reduces Cognitive Load
Audience Analysis enables Conflict Resolution
Understanding audience = understanding trust networks
Transaction costs modeled by Game Theory
Transaction costs + Inversion: What fees to avoid
Chord progressions require Pattern Recognition
Repetition mastery = Kinesthetic learning through practice
Emotional resonance in music informs audience emotional state
Progressive overload = Repetition mastery with increasing difficulty
Spatial awareness applies to abstract system design
High cognitive load prevents Flow State
Transfer learning uses decomposition to cross domains
Inversion enhances risk assessment (what to avoid)
Circle of competence guides trust network participation
Second-order thinking extends game theory analysis
Feedback loops create progressive overload gains
Bayesian thinking enables better transfer learning
Decomposition enables modularity
Modularity uses APIs for communication
Audience analysis requires tone modulation
Transaction costs manifest as middleman economics
Chord progressions create emotional resonance
Progressive overload requires risk assessment
